overview.short: Thinthirineesvarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Tindivanam in Villupuram district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Tindivanam
topPlaces.description: Tindivanam is a town in Viluppuram district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.The City was earlier known as "Thinthirivanam" (திந்திரிவனம்) due to the Shivan Thinthrineeswarar temple located in it. It is the second largest city in Villupuram District after the headquarters Villupuram .

topPlaces.name: Annamputhur
topPlaces.description: Annamputhur is a village panchayat in the Marakkanam block, Viluppuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. The panchayat is known for Srinidheeswarar temple and a huge Shivalinga that people of this area have had reconstructed with the help of the Archaeological Survey of India.

topPlaces.name: Olakkur block
topPlaces.description: The Olakkur block is a revenue block in the Viluppuram district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 52 panchayat villages.

items.note: Tindivanam is a town in Viluppuram district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.The City was earlier known as "Thinthirivanam" (திந்திரிவனம்) due to the Shivan Thinthrineeswarar temple located in it. It is the second largest city in Villupuram District after the headquarters Villupuram .

Annamputhur is a village panchayat in the Marakkanam block, Viluppuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. The panchayat is known for Srinidheeswarar temple and a huge Shivalinga that people of this area have had reconstructed with the help of the Archaeological Survey of India.
The Olakkur block is a revenue block in the Viluppuram district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 52 panchayat villages.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thinthirineesvarar Temple, Tindivanam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thinthirineesvarar Temple, Tindivanam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thinthirineesvarar Temple, Tindivanam?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (101 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (116 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thinthirineesvarar Temple, Tindivanam?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thinthirineesvarar Temple, Tindivanam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thinthirineesvarar Temple, Tindivanam?
faq.a: Stays in Thinthirineesvarar Temple, Tindivanam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thinthirineesvarar Temple, Tindivanam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tindivanam, Annamputhur, Olakkur block.
